g.title: HES_QSP
g.text: Hypereosinophilic Syndrome (HES) — Integrated QSP Mechanistic Map
Myeloid/neoplastic (FIP1L1-PDGFRA·PDGFRB·FGFR1·JAK2) & lymphocytic-variant (clonal Th2) eosinophilopoiesis · Eosinophil effector/organ-damage cascade
Imatinib · Corticosteroids · Mepolizumab/Benralizumab (anti-IL-5 axis) · Hydroxyurea/Ruxolitinib/IFN-α · Cardiac(Loeffler)/pulmonary/dermatologic/neurologic/GI endpoints

g.title: cluster_cytoreductive
g.text: 12. Drug PK/PD — Hydroxyurea / Ruxolitinib / IFN-α / Alemtuzumab
